parameters.query:
WITH dd_dedup AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (btrim(dd.retroid))
    dd.id,
    btrim(dd.retroid) AS retroid
  FROM mes_daily_data.delivery_detail dd
  WHERE dd.createtime >= {{ $json.monthStartSql }}
    AND dd.createtime <= {{ $json.monthEndSql }}
  ORDER BY btrim(dd.retroid), dd.id DESC
),
dd_new AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM dd_dedup d
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM mes_daily_data.delivery_detail prev
    WHERE btrim(prev.retroid) = d.retroid
      AND prev.createtime < {{ $json.monthStartSql }}
  )
),
di_dedup AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (btrim(di.retroid))
    btrim(di.retroid) AS retroid,
    di.machine_type
  FROM mes_daily_data.daily_info di
  ORDER BY
    btrim(di.retroid),
    (di.machine_type IS NOT NULL) DESC,
    di.id DESC
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(di.machine_type, 'UNKNOWN') AS machine_type,
  COUNT(*) AS total_cnt
FROM dd_new dd
LEFT JOIN di_dedup di
  ON di.retroid = dd.retroid
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY total_cnt DESC;

WITH dd_dedup AS (
  -- 当月：每个retroid取delivery_detail.id最大的一条（当月内唯一）
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (btrim(dd.retroid))
    btrim(dd.retroid) AS retroid,
    dd.id,
    dd.createtime
  FROM mes_daily_data.delivery_detail dd
  WHERE dd.createtime >= {{ $json.monthStartSql }}
    AND dd.createtime <= {{ $json.monthEndSql }}
  ORDER BY btrim(dd.retroid), dd.id DESC
),
dd_first_time AS (
  -- 只保留：在月初之前从未出现过的retroid（即“第一次出现”发生在本月）
  SELECT d.*
  FROM dd_dedup d
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM mes_daily_data.delivery_detail prev
    WHERE btrim(prev.retroid) = d.retroid
      AND prev.createtime < {{ $json.monthStartSql }}
  )
),
di_dedup AS (
  -- 每个retroid在daily_info里取“机型有值优先，其次id最大”的一条
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (btrim(di.retroid))
    btrim(di.retroid) AS retroid,
    di.machine_type
  FROM mes_daily_data.daily_info di
  ORDER BY
    btrim(di.retroid),
    (di.machine_type IS NOT NULL) DESC,
    di.id DESC
)
SELECT
  dd.retroid
FROM dd_first_time dd
LEFT JOIN di_dedup di
  ON di.retroid = dd.retroid
WHERE di.machine_type IS NULL
ORDER BY dd.retroid;
